name: Open-Faced Crab Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
Slice the cheese into 12 pieces, each about 2 ounces.
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
++++ Soften the cream cheese with the ginger ale. Mix in the onion,
Worcestershire sauce and crab. Split the muffins in half and place 2
heaping tablespoons of the crab mixture on each half. Top with a slice of
tomato and cheddar cheese. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes or until
heated through and cheddar is melted. Serve hot.
